question: For how long is the thunder audible while the /m/0bzvm2 is also present?
final_response: <think><seg>7.172, 9.209</seg> contains the sound of thunder (<m>0bzvm2</m>), which occurs during <seg>6.90, 9.321</seg>. The overlapping duration is calculated as the minimum of the end times (9.209) minus the maximum of the start times (6.90), which equals 2.309 seconds.
